<!DOCTYPE html>

<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Dabz Global — Promo 4K</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Bebas+Neue&family=Orbitron:wght@400;700;900&family=Rajdhani:wght@300;400;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
*{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box}
:root{
  --gold:#FFD700;--gold2:#FFA500;--neon:#00FFFF;--neon2:#00FF99;
  --bg:#050810;--white:#F0F4FF;
}
html,body{width:100%;height:100%;overflow:hidden;background:var(--bg);font-family:'Rajdhani',sans-serif;color:var(--white)}
canvas#bg{position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:0}

/* SCENE SYSTEM */
.scene{position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:10;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
opacity:0;transform:translateY(60px);transition:opacity 0.7s ease,transform 0.7s ease;pointer-events:none}
.scene.active{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0);pointer-events:all}

/* CORNERS */
.corner{position:fixed;width:44px;height:44px;z-index:50;opacity:0.5}
.corner::before,.corner::after{content:’’;position:absolute;background:var(–gold)}
.corner::before{width:2px;height:100%}.corner::after{width:100%;height:2px}
.tl{top:18px;left:18px}.tr{top:18px;right:18px}.tr::before{right:0}.bl{bottom:18px;left:18px}.bl::before{bottom:0}.bl::after{bottom:0}.br{bottom:18px;right:18px}.br::before{right:0;bottom:0}.br::after{bottom:0}

/* PROGRESS */
#progress{position:fixed;bottom:0;left:0;height:3px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(–gold),var(–neon));z-index:50;width:0%;box-shadow:0 0 10px var(–gold);transition:width 0.3s linear}
#dots{position:fixed;right:22px;top:50%;transform:translateY(-50%);display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:10px;z-index:50}
.dot{width:7px;height:7px;border-radius:50%;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.2);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.3);cursor:pointer;transition:all 0.3s}
.dot.on{background:var(–gold);box-shadow:0 0 8px var(–gold);transform:scale(1.4)}
#counter{position:fixed;bottom:18px;right:22px;font-family:‘Orbitron’,sans-serif;font-size:11px;letter-spacing:3px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.3);z-index:50}
#replay{position:fixed;bottom:14px;left:22px;font-family:‘Orbitron’,sans-serif;font-size:10px;letter-spacing:3px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.3);z-index:50;cursor:pointer;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);padding:7px 12px;border-radius:4px;background:none;transition:all 0.3s}
#replay:hover{color:var(–gold);border-color:var(–gold)}

/* ===== SCENE 1: LOGO ===== */
#s1 .logo-ring{position:absolute;top:50%;left:50%;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);width:300px;height:300px;border-radius:50%;border:1.5px solid rgba(0,255,255,0.25);animation:spin 12s linear infinite}
#s1 .logo-ring2{position:absolute;top:50%;left:50%;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);width:240px;height:240px;border-radius:50%;border:1px solid rgba(255,215,0,0.15);animation:spin 8s linear infinite reverse}
#s1 .logo-ring::before{content:’’;position:absolute;top:-4px;left:50%;width:8px;height:8px;background:var(–neon);border-radius:50%;box-shadow:0 0 14px var(–neon)}
@keyframes spin{to{transform:translate(-50%,-50%) rotate(360deg)}}
.hex{width:110px;height:126px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(–gold),var(–gold2));clip-path:polygon(50% 0%,100% 25%,100% 75%,50% 100%,0% 75%,0% 25%);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-family:‘Bebas Neue’,sans-serif;font-size:46px;color:var(–bg);letter-spacing:2px;animation:hpulse 2s ease-in-out infinite}
@keyframes hpulse{0%,100%{box-shadow:0 0 40px rgba(255,215,0,0.4)}50%{box-shadow:0 0 80px rgba(255,215,0,0.9)}}
.brand{font-family:‘Bebas Neue’,sans-serif;font-size:clamp(52px,8vw,96px);letter-spacing:10px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#fff 20%,var(–gold) 50%,#fff 80%);-webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;background-clip:text;animation:shimmer 3s linear infinite;background-size:200% auto;margin-top:8px}
@keyframes shimmer{to{background-position:200% center}}
.tagrow{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:14px;margin-top:12px}
.tagdot{width:5px;height:5px;border-radius:50%;background:var(–gold);box-shadow:0 0 8px var(–gold)}
.tagtxt{font-family:‘Orbitron’,sans-serif;font-size:clamp(10px,1.4vw,15px);letter-spacing:7px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.7)}
.subtag{font-family:‘Orbitron’,sans-serif;font-size:10px;letter-spacing:5px;color:rgba(255,215,0,0.5);margin-top:8px}

/* ===== SCENE 2: PRODUCTS ===== */
#s2{gap:16px}
.s-title{font-family:‘Orbitron’,sans-serif;font-size:clamp(9px,1.1vw,12px);letter-spacing:6px;color:var(–neon);text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:4px}
.pgrid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:18px;width:90%;max-width:1200px}
.pcard{background:rgba(255,255,255,0.04);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);border-radius:18px;padding:24px 16px 20px;text-align:center;position:relative;overflow:hidden;animation:float 6s ease-in-out infinite;transition:transform 0.4s,border-color 0.4s}
.pcard:nth-child(2){animation-delay:0.5s}.pcard:nth-child(3){animation-delay:1s}.pcard:nth-child(4){animation-delay:1.5s}
@keyframes float{0%,100%{transform:translateY(0)}50%{transform:translateY(-10px)}}
.pcard::before{content:’’;position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:1px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,var(–gold),transparent);opacity:0.6}
.pcard:hover{border-color:rgba(255,215,0,0.4);transform:translateY(-14px) scale(1.02)!important;animation:none}
.dw{height:140px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;margin-bottom:14px;position:relative}

/* MacBook CSS */
.mb{position:relative;width:160px}
.mb-screen{width:160px;height:95px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#1a1a2e,#16213e,#0f3460);border-radius:8px 8px 2px 2px;border:2px solid #555;position:relative;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:0 0 28px rgba(0,150,255,0.3)}
.mb-ui{position:absolute;inset:8px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:4px;justify-content:center;align-items:center}
.mb-bar{width:80%;height:2px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(–neon),transparent);border-radius:2px;opacity:0.8}
.mb-bar.g{width:60%;opacity:0.5;background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(–gold),transparent)}.mb-bar.s{width:40%;opacity:0.3}
.mb-apple{position:absolute;top:4px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);font-size:10px;opacity:0.9}
.mb-hinge{width:160px;height:4px;background:#333;margin:0 auto}
.mb-base{width:180px;height:6px;background:linear-gradient(180deg,#888,#555);border-radius:0 0 4px 4px;margin:0 auto}

/* iPhone */
.iph{width:60px;height:115px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#1c1c1e,#2c2c2e);border-radius:17px;border:2px solid #444;position:relative;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:0 0 28px rgba(255,255,255,0.08)}
.iph-s{position:absolute;inset:4px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#000814,#001233);border-radius:13px;overflow:hidden;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:5px}
.iph-notch{position:absolute;top:6px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);width:22px;height:5px;background:#000;border-radius:10px;z-index:2}
.iph-dot{width:20px;height:20px;border-radius:50%;background:conic-gradient(var(–neon),var(–gold),var(–neon2),var(–neon));animation:spin 3s linear infinite;margin-top:8px}
.iph-line{width:70%;height:1.5px;border-radius:2px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.3)}
.iph-line.s{width:50%;opacity:0.5}

/* Samsung */
.sam{width:60px;height:115px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#0a0a0a,#1a1a2e);border-radius:15px;border:2px solid #1F4E79;position:relative;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:0 0 28px rgba(30,120,255,0.22)}
.sam-s{position:absolute;inset:3px;background:linear-gradient(180deg,#000510,#001a40);border-radius:12px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:5px}
.sam-icon{width:22px;height:22px;border-radius:6px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#1565C0,#42A5F5);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:9px;font-weight:700;color:#fff;font-family:‘Orbitron’,sans-serif}
.sam-line{width:60%;height:1.5px;background:rgba(66,165,245,0.4);border-radius:2px}
.sam-line.s{width:40%;opacity:0.5}

/* Watch — uses real image */
.watch-img-wrap{position:relative;height:136px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center}
.watch-img{width:auto;height:130px;object-fit:contain;filter:drop-shadow(0 0 18px rgba(0,255,153,0.35));animation:watchglow 2.5s ease-in-out infinite}
@keyframes watchglow{0%,100%{filter:drop-shadow(0 0 14px rgba(0,255,153,0.3))}50%{filter:drop-shadow(0 0 28px rgba(0,255,153,0.7))}}

.plabel{font-family:‘Bebas Neue’,sans-serif;font-size:clamp(17px,2vw,23px);letter-spacing:3px;margin-bottom:3px}
.psub{font-family:‘Rajdhani’,sans-serif;font-size:11px;letter-spacing:3px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.4);text-transform:uppercase}
.badge{display:inline-block;margin-top:9px;padding:4px 10px;border-radius:20px;font-size:9px;letter-spacing:2px;font-family:‘Orbitron’,sans-serif;text-transform:uppercase}
.bn{background:rgba(0,255,153,0.1);border:1px solid rgba(0,255,153,0.3);color:var(–neon2)}
.bh{background:rgba(255,100,0,0.1);border:1px solid rgba(255,100,0,0.3);color:#FF6400}
.bs{background:rgba(255,215,0,0.1);border:1px solid rgba(255,215,0,0.3);color:var(–gold)}
.bt{background:rgba(0,200,255,0.1);border:1px solid rgba(0,200,255,0.3);color:var(–neon)}

/* ===== SCENE 3: SERVICES ===== */
#s3{position:fixed}
.scan{position:absolute;left:0;right:0;height:2px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,var(–neon),transparent);animation:scanline 3s ease-in-out infinite;opacity:0.4;pointer-events:none}
@keyframes scanline{0%{top:-5%;opacity:0}10%{opacity:0.4}90%{opacity:0.4}100%{top:105%;opacity:0}}
.svc-wrap{text-align:center;width:90%;max-width:900px}
.svc-title{font-family:‘Orbitron’,sans-serif;font-size:clamp(9px,1.1vw,12px);letter-spacing:6px;color:var(–neon);text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:10px}
.svc-head{font-family:‘Bebas Neue’,sans-serif;font-size:clamp(56px,10vw,126px);line-height:0.9;letter-spacing:8px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(–gold) 0%,#fff 40%,var(–gold2) 60%,var(–neon) 100%);-webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;background-clip:text;animation:shimmer 3s linear infinite;background-size:200% auto}
.pills{display:flex;gap:12px;justify-content:center;margin-top:26px;flex-wrap:wrap}
.pill{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:9px;padding:13px 26px;border-radius:60px;font-family:‘Orbitron’,sans-serif;font-size:13px;letter-spacing:2px}
.p1{background:rgba(0,255,255,0.08);border:1px solid rgba(0,255,255,0.3);color:var(–neon)}
.p2{background:rgba(255,215,0,0.08);border:1px solid rgba(255,215,0,0.3);color:var(–gold)}
.p3{background:rgba(0,255,153,0.08);border:1px solid rgba(0,255,153,0.3);color:var(–neon2)}
.pico{font-size:18px}
.svc-sub{margin-top:28px;font-family:‘Rajdhani’,sans-serif;font-size:clamp(13px,1.8vw,18px);letter-spacing:4px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.45);text-transform:uppercase}

/* ===== SCENE 4: CTA ===== */
#s4 .cta-wrap{text-align:center;width:90%;max-width:880px}
.cta-lbl{font-family:‘Orbitron’,sans-serif;font-size:clamp(9px,1vw,12px);letter-spacing:6px;color:var(–neon);margin-bottom:14px;text-transform:uppercase}
.cta-head{font-family:‘Bebas Neue’,sans-serif;font-size:clamp(40px,7vw,86px);letter-spacing:7px;line-height:1;margin-bottom:8px;background:linear-gradient(180deg,#fff,rgba(255,255,255,0.6));-webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;background-clip:text}
.cdiv{width:80px;height:2px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,var(–gold),transparent);margin:18px auto}
.cgrid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:12px;margin-top:20px;max-width:620px;margin-left:auto;margin-right:auto}
.ccard{background:rgba(255,255,255,0.04);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);border-radius:14px;padding:16px 20px;text-align:left;position:relative;overflow:hidden}
.ccard::before{content:’’;position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:1px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,rgba(255,215,0,0.5),transparent)}
.ccard.full{grid-column:1/-1}
.cico{font-size:20px;margin-bottom:5px;display:block}
.ckey{font-family:‘Orbitron’,sans-serif;font-size:9px;letter-spacing:3px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.35);text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:3px}
.cval{font-family:‘Rajdhani’,sans-serif;font-size:clamp(13px,1.7vw,17px);font-weight:600;color:var(–white);letter-spacing:1px}
.cval.g{color:var(–gold)}.cval.n{color:var(–neon)}
.cta-btn{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin-top:24px;padding:16px 44px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(–gold),var(–gold2));color:#000;font-family:‘Bebas Neue’,sans-serif;font-size:20px;letter-spacing:5px;border-radius:60px;position:relative;overflow:hidden;text-decoration:none;box-shadow:0 0 40px rgba(255,215,0,0.3);animation:pbtn 2s ease-in-out infinite}
@keyframes pbtn{0%,100%{box-shadow:0 0 28px rgba(255,215,0,0.3);transform:scale(1)}50%{box-shadow:0 0 56px rgba(255,215,0,0.6);transform:scale(1.02)}}
.cta-btn::before{content:’’;position:absolute;top:-50%;left:-60%;width:40%;height:200%;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.3);transform:skewX(-20deg);animation:shine 3s ease-in-out infinite}
@keyframes shine{0%{left:-60%}40%,100%{left:130%}}
.insta{margin-top:16px;font-family:‘Orbitron’,sans-serif;font-size:clamp(10px,1.2vw,13px);letter-spacing:3px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.4)}
.insta-h{color:var(–neon2);font-weight:700}
</style>

</head>
<body>
<canvas id="bg"></canvas>

<div class="corner tl"></div><div class="corner tr"></div>
<div class="corner bl"></div><div class="corner br"></div>
<div id="dots"><div class="dot on" onclick="go(0)"></div><div class="dot" onclick="go(1)"></div><div class="dot" onclick="go(2)"></div><div class="dot" onclick="go(3)"></div></div>
<div id="counter">01 / 04</div>
<div id="progress"></div>
<button id="replay" onclick="restart()">&#x21BA; REPLAY</button>

<!-- SCENE 1: LOGO -->

<div class="scene active" id="s1">
  <div style="position:relative;text-align:center">
    <div class="logo-ring"></div><div class="logo-ring2"></div>
    <div class="hex" style="margin:0 auto 20px">DG</div>
    <div class="brand">DABZ GLOBAL</div>
    <div class="tagrow" style="justify-content:center">
      <div class="tagdot"></div><span class="tagtxt">Phone</span>
      <div class="tagdot"></div><span class="tagtxt">Laptop</span>
      <div class="tagdot"></div><span class="tagtxt">Accessories</span>
      <div class="tagdot"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="subtag">ABUJA&apos;S PREMIER GADGET STORE</div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- SCENE 2: PRODUCTS -->

<div class="scene" id="s2">
  <div class="s-title">— Our Premium Collection —</div>
  <div class="pgrid">
    <!-- MacBook -->
    <div class="pcard">
      <div class="dw">
        <div class="mb">
          <div class="mb-screen"><span class="mb-apple">🍎</span><div class="mb-ui"><div class="mb-bar"></div><div class="mb-bar g"></div><div class="mb-bar"></div><div class="mb-bar s"></div></div></div>
          <div class="mb-hinge"></div><div class="mb-base"></div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="plabel">MacBook</div><div class="psub">Apple Series</div>
      <div class="badge bn">In Stock</div>
    </div>
    <!-- Smartwatch — REAL IMAGE -->
    <div class="pcard">
      <div class="dw">
        <div class="watch-img-wrap">
          <img class="watch-img" src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Smartwatch" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="plabel">Smartwatch</div><div class="psub">Health + Fitness</div>
      <div class="badge bt">Premium</div>
    </div>
    <!-- Samsung -->
    <div class="pcard">
      <div class="dw">
        <div class="sam"><div class="sam-s"><div class="sam-icon">S</div><div class="sam-line"></div><div class="sam-line s"></div><div class="sam-line"></div></div></div>
      </div>
      <div class="plabel">Samsung</div><div class="psub">Galaxy Series</div>
      <div class="badge bh">Hot Deal</div>
    </div>
    <!-- iPhone -->
    <div class="pcard">
      <div class="dw">
        <div class="iph"><div class="iph-s"><div class="iph-notch"></div><div class="iph-dot"></div><div class="iph-line"></div><div class="iph-line s"></div><div class="iph-line"></div></div></div>
      </div>
      <div class="plabel">iPhone</div><div class="psub">Apple Series</div>
      <div class="badge bs">Swappable</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- SCENE 3: SERVICES -->

<div class="scene" id="s3">
  <div class="scan"></div>
  <div class="svc-wrap">
    <div class="svc-title">— What We Do —</div>
    <div class="svc-head">WE SWAP<br>WE SELL<br>WE BUY</div>
    <div class="pills">
      <div class="pill p1"><span class="pico">🔄</span><span>Device Swap</span></div>
      <div class="pill p2"><span class="pico">🚚</span><span>Nationwide Delivery</span></div>
      <div class="pill p3"><span class="pico">✅</span><span>Payment Verified</span></div>
    </div>
    <div class="svc-sub">Upgrade Seamlessly. Trade Your Old. Get the New.</div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- SCENE 4: CTA -->

<div class="scene" id="s4">
  <div class="cta-wrap">
    <div class="cta-lbl">Get In Touch Today</div>
    <div class="cta-head">VISIT. CALL.<br>WHATSAPP.</div>
    <div class="cdiv"></div>
    <div class="cgrid">
      <div class="ccard"><span class="cico">📍</span><div class="ckey">Location</div><div class="cval">Suite C3, New Banex Plaza, Abuja</div></div>
      <div class="ccard"><span class="cico">📱</span><div class="ckey">Call / WhatsApp</div><div class="cval g">08144343028<br>09078333831</div></div>
      <div class="ccard full"><span class="cico">📸</span><div class="ckey">Instagram</div><div class="cval n">@dabz_global_official</div></div>
    </div>
    <a class="cta-btn" href="#">DM / CALL TO GET STARTED</a>
    <div class="insta">Find us on Instagram &nbsp;·&nbsp; <span class="insta-h">@dabz_global_official</span></div>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
// ===== BACKGROUND CANVAS =====
const cv = document.getElementById('bg');
const ctx = cv.getContext('2d');
function resize(){cv.width=innerWidth;cv.height=innerHeight}
resize(); window.addEventListener('resize',resize);

const COLS=['rgba(255,215,0,','rgba(0,255,255,','rgba(0,255,153,','rgba(255,100,0,'];
class P{
  constructor(){this.reset()}
  reset(){this.x=Math.random()*cv.width;this.y=Math.random()*cv.height;this.r=Math.random()*1.5+0.3;this.c=COLS[Math.floor(Math.random()*COLS.length)];this.a=Math.random()*0.5+0.1;this.vx=(Math.random()-0.5)*0.3;this.vy=(Math.random()-0.5)*0.3;this.life=Math.random()*200+100;this.age=0}
  update(){this.x+=this.vx;this.y+=this.vy;this.age++;if(this.age>this.life)this.reset()}
  draw(){ctx.beginPath();ctx.arc(this.x,this.y,this.r,0,Math.PI*2);ctx.fillStyle=this.c+this.a+')';ctx.fill()}
}
const pts=Array.from({length:150},()=>new P());
function drawGrid(){ctx.strokeStyle='rgba(255,255,255,0.018)';ctx.lineWidth=1;for(let x=0;x<cv.width;x+=80){ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(x,0);ctx.lineTo(x,cv.height);ctx.stroke()}for(let y=0;y<cv.height;y+=80){ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(0,y);ctx.lineTo(cv.width,y);ctx.stroke()}}
function drawOrbs(t){const o=[{x:0.15,y:0.2,r:280,c:[255,180,0]},{x:0.85,y:0.75,r:240,c:[0,180,255]},{x:0.5,y:0.9,r:200,c:[0,255,120]},{x:0.8,y:0.15,r:190,c:[200,0,255]}];for(const v of o){const px=v.x*cv.width+Math.sin(t*0.0003+v.x*10)*28;const py=v.y*cv.height+Math.cos(t*0.0004+v.y*10)*18;const g=ctx.createRadialGradient(px,py,0,px,py,v.r);g.addColorStop(0,`rgba(${v.c[0]},${v.c[1]},${v.c[2]},0.055)`);g.addColorStop(1,'rgba(0,0,0,0)');ctx.beginPath();ctx.arc(px,py,v.r,0,Math.PI*2);ctx.fillStyle=g;ctx.fill()}}
let T=0;
ctx.fillStyle='#050810';ctx.fillRect(0,0,cv.width,cv.height);
(function loop(){T++;ctx.fillStyle='rgba(5,8,16,0.14)';ctx.fillRect(0,0,cv.width,cv.height);drawGrid();drawOrbs(T);pts.forEach(p=>{p.update();p.draw()});requestAnimationFrame(loop)})();

// ===== SCENE CONTROL =====
const SCENES=['s1','s2','s3','s4'];
const DURATIONS=[5000,7000,6000,8000];
const LABELS=['01 / 04','02 / 04','03 / 04','04 / 04'];
const dots=document.querySelectorAll('.dot');
const progress=document.getElementById('progress');
const counter=document.getElementById('counter');
let cur=0,timer=null,pTimer=null,pStart=null;

function showScene(i){
  SCENES.forEach((id,k)=>{
    const el=document.getElementById(id);
    el.classList.toggle('active',k===i);
  });
  dots.forEach((d,k)=>d.classList.toggle('on',k===i));
  counter.textContent=LABELS[i];
  cur=i;
  animProg(i);
}

function animProg(i){
  if(pTimer)cancelAnimationFrame(pTimer);
  pStart=performance.now();
  const dur=DURATIONS[i];
  const base=(i/SCENES.length)*100;
  const next=((i+1)/SCENES.length)*100;
  (function step(now){
    const frac=Math.min((now-pStart)/dur,1);
    progress.style.width=(base+(next-base)*frac)+'%';
    if(frac<1)pTimer=requestAnimationFrame(step);
  })(pStart);
}

function advance(){
  const next=(cur+1)%SCENES.length;
  showScene(next);
  schedule();
}

function schedule(){
  clearTimeout(timer);
  timer=setTimeout(advance,DURATIONS[cur]);
}

function go(i){clearTimeout(timer);showScene(i);schedule()}
function restart(){go(0)}

// Keyboard
document.addEventListener('keydown',e=>{
  if(e.key==='ArrowRight'||e.key===' ') advance();
  else if(e.key==='ArrowLeft') go((cur-1+SCENES.length)%SCENES.length);
});

// Touch/Swipe UP support
let ty0=null;
document.addEventListener('touchstart',e=>{ty0=e.touches[0].clientY},{passive:true});
document.addEventListener('touchend',e=>{
  if(ty0===null)return;
  const dy=ty0-e.changedTouches[0].clientY;
  if(Math.abs(dy)>40){dy>0?advance():go((cur-1+SCENES.length)%SCENES.length)}
  ty0=null;
},{passive:true});

showScene(0);
schedule();
</script>

</body>
</html>
